feature.description: Start a new feature in a git worktree
feature.template:
Start work on a new feature called $ARGUMENTS.

First propose the exact git commands needed to create the branch and worktree. Do not run them until approved.

After the worktree exists, create an implementation plan. Do not implement yet.

feature-cleanup.description: Remove a feature worktree after merging
feature-cleanup.template:
Clean up the worktree for feature $ARGUMENTS.

Propose the following commands and wait for approval before running them:
1. `git worktree remove ../${PWD##*/}-$ARGUMENTS`
2. `git branch -d feature/$ARGUMENTS`

Do not run them until approved.

feature-status.template: Run `git worktree list` and `git branch -v` and give me a summary of all active feature worktrees, which branches they're on, and their latest commit message.

plan.description: Find relevant files and create an implementation plan
plan.template:
Analyze the codebase and create a detailed implementation plan for: $ARGUMENTS

Save the plan to .opencode/plans/<short-kebab-case-task-name>.md before finishing.

review.template: Review the current git diff and staged changes against the active plan, if present. Report blocking issues first. Include suggestions only if useful. End with APPROVE or REQUEST CHANGES.

debug.description: Diagnose a failing check or test
debug.template:
A check or test is failing. Diagnose the root cause and provide a minimal fix recommendation. Do not edit any files.

Failing command or error: $ARGUMENTS

Follow the debugger protocol: reproduce → isolate → recommend fix. Report findings in the standard debug report format.

spar.description: Think through a technical problem before planning
spar.template:
I want to think through this before writing any code: $ARGUMENTS

Challenge my assumptions, suggest alternatives, and help me reach a decision. When we're aligned, pass to @planner.
